channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download UWPSpy 1.5.3
item.description: UWPSpy is a testing tool for UWP and WinUI 3 applications. Seamlessly view and manipulate UI elements and their properties in real time. It allows users to observe how changes affect the structure and functionality of their UWP app. This is beneficial for helping with user interface design tasks during application development. When you select specific properties, the associated elements will be highlighted and any changes will update in real time. How to use: Run UWPSpy.exe and...

item.title: Download HFS: HTTP File Server (version 3) 3.0.9
item.description: HFS is a web file server to run on your computer. Share a folder or even a file thanks to the virtual file system. Essentially, this application turns your computer into an HTTP server and all users who want to connect and download files can do so by loading a simple website in their browser. HFS includes many configuration settings, so you can basically change each part of the application, starting with how users download files and ending with the appearance of the created website. HFS...

item.title: Download Currency Converter Plus 3.2.1
item.description: Advanced currency converter - With multiple currency fields, historical rate charts, and a built-in calculator for convenience, compare prices wherever you travel abroad to ensure Make sure you get the best deal at today's price. All conversions use live exchange rates from AccuRate™, providing the most accurate rates available in the world. Plus, it still works offline for moves when exchange rate data isn't available. This app even supports Bitcoin! Features of Currency Converter...

item.title: Download Silent Camera [High Quality] 8.16.13
item.description: Introducing the best silent camera! Without the shutter sound, photos can be taken in complete silence! It also ranks number 1 among many silent cameras thanks to its high image quality! Take high-quality photos with the silent camera! You won't disturb anyone around you because the shutter sound can't be heard. You can take high-quality photos of any situation, such as your baby's cute sleeping face, your pet's natural behaviors, and words written on a blackboard! Silent Camera...

item.title: Download Psiphon VPN: Freedom Online v458
item.description: Psiphon Pro is a VPN application for Android that allows users to access the Internet freely and securely. It uses a combination of VPN, SSH and HTTP proxy technologies to bypass censorship and firewalls, providing users with unrestricted internet access. It gives you unprecedented access to your favorite news broadcast or social media platforms. In essence, Psiphon Pro also protects you when accessing WiFi hotspots by creating a secure, private tunnel between you and the Internet....

item.title: Download IP Tools: WiFi Analyzer 9.6.1

It allows quickly detecting all computer network problems, detecting IP addresses and increasing network performance. This is an indispensable application for IT experts and network administrators. IP Tools has a simple and intuitive interface, so you can get full information about your network in seconds, find internal or external IP (with the feature "My IP"), SSID, BSSID, broadcast address, gate, cyber mask,...

item.title: Download CallApp: Caller ID & Block 2.258

Our caller ID with caller tracking and phone number lookup will always let you know who called, with a next-level user experience. item.title: Download Magnifying Glass 4.2.1
item.description: Magnifier is a simple app for Android devices used to magnify the appearance of objects or text that are small and difficult to see with the naked eye. Features of Magnifier for Android Zoom: from 1x to 10x. Flashlight: Use a flashlight in dark places or at night. Freeze: After freezing, you can view a more detailed enlarged image. Take a photo: Save an enlarged photo on your phone. Completely free.

Customize your app by switching the background theme using Settings. Features of Speed ​​test 4G 5G WiFi & maps Full QoS test: In seconds,...

item.title: Download Obd Mary – Car Scanner for ELM 1.297
item.description: Obd Mary is a car diagnostic scanner, dashboard and trip computer with some cool features. Attention!!! You need an ELM327 Bluetooth or Wi-Fi adapter to connect to your vehicle using this app. Your vehicle may contain several ECUs (electronic control modules), so don't forget to check all of them. ELM version 2.1 adapters can often break, so try to choose version 1.5 if you are selected. Quick start guide 1. Download the app 2. Plug the ELM327 adapter into your vehicle 's...

item.title: Download Background Video Recorder Pro 17.3.39
item.description: This application helps you record videos in the background even when the screen is closed. it has many other useful features, such as: remote camera control with Wear OS, motion detector with artificial intelligence algorithm, baby monitoring, calendar recording and continuous photo capture. You can also control the camera with the volume button or 1 of 3 supported widgets "Big red button" - record video. "Big green button" - motion detection. "Big orange button" - takes photos...

item.title: Download Video Converter, Compressor 19.0.0
item.description: The fastest video converter and compressor on the market supports almost all video formats: MP4, MKV, AVI, 3GP, MOV, MTS, MPEG, MPG, WMV, M4V, VOB, FLV, etc. This converter and compressor supports converting, compressing, changing resolution, Frame Rate (FPS), bitrate of video files. It can also convert video files to audio formats like MP3, AAC, AC3, OGG, M4A, WAV, etc. Key Features Convert and compress your videos to almost any video and audio format. Choose from predefined 4K to...

item.title: Download PDF Utils: Merge, Split & Edit 15.4
item.description: PDF Utils is an Android application that allows users to merge, split, and edit PDF files. With this application, users can easily combine multiple PDF files into one document, split a PDF file into multiple documents, and edit PDF files by adding or deleting pages, rotating pages, etc. PDF Utils is a useful tool for those who need to work with PDF files frequently. However, please note that the application cannot always edit complex PDF files or maintain the original formatting of the...

item.title: Download Compress Video Size Compressor 19.2.0
item.description: Compact Video app can compress and convert almost any video format. It provides users with default compression profiles/presets. Users can choose the desired compression quality, compression rate, video resolution, bitrate, etc. Additionally, this compressor and converter allows users to enter the desired compressed video size and it compresses the video to that size. Additionally, you can compress videos in batch mode by queuing multiple videos. This video compressor can compress...

item.title: Download 1Weather: Forecast & Radar 12.4.5

Whether you want to check temperatures, forecast precipitation, Doppler radar, or simply track the current phases of the sun and moon, 1Weather has you covered. Plus, it's got an outstanding design that makes getting your weather information easy and fun. Track current conditions and forecasts for your location and up to 12 locations of your choice.
